response.justification: Candidate's profile does not align with the mandatory requirements. Hands-on C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014-2015) plus a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years. The recent decade is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang on web, GIS, and direct-mail platforms, with no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle exposure, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience. Strong general engineering background, but the core requirements for this specific role are not met.
strengths: Broad senior-level engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Solid software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, none on Windows in the last decade
No SQL Server or Oracle experience indicated; SQL listed only generically
Zero Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No Capital Markets / Fixed Income domain
